children.name: Uroteuthis duvaucelii
children.description: Uroteuthis duvaucelii, also known as the Indian Ocean squid or Indian squid, is an Indo-West Pacific species of squid with a wide range throughout the Indian Ocean to Malaysia and the South China Sea, and is also present in the Red Sea and the Arabian Sea.

children.name: Uroteuthis edulis
children.description: The swordtip squid  is a species of loliginid squid from the genus Uroteuthis. It was first described by William Evans Hoyle in 1885. In the past, it resided among the genus Loligo until it was reclassified under the genus Uroteuthis.

children.name: Uroteuthis etheridgei
children.description: Uroteuthis etheridgei — a species in the genus Uroteuthis, family Loliginidae. Also known as inshore squids.

children.name: Uroteuthis machelae
children.description: Uroteuthis machelae — a species in the genus Uroteuthis, family Loliginidae. Also known as inshore squids.

children.name: Uroteuthis noctiluca
children.description: Uroteuthis noctiluca, commonly known as the luminous bay squid, is a species of squid native to shallow water on the eastern coast of Australia.

children.name: Uroteuthis pickfordae

children.description: Uroteuthis reesi, commonly known as Rees' squid, is a species of squid in the family Loliginidae.

children.name: Uroteuthis sibogae
children.description: Uroteuthis arabica is a species of squid from the genus Uroteuthis. The species has been documented in the Pacific Ocean near India, and members of the species can grown to a length of ~16 centimeters.

children.name: Uroteuthis singhalensis
children.description: Uroteuthis singhalensis, commonly known as the long barrel squid, is a species of squid from the genus Uroteuthis.

children.name: Uroteuthis vossi

children.description: Lolliguncula argus, commonly known as the Argus brief squid or the Argus thumbstall squid, is a species of squid in the family Loliginidae.

children.name: Lolliguncula brevis
children.description: Lolliguncula brevis, or the Atlantic brief squid, is a small species of squid in the Loliginidae family.

children.name: Lolliguncula diomedeae

children.description: Loligo bollensis — a species in the genus Loligo, family Loliginidae. Also known as inshore squids.

children.name: Loligo forbesii
children.description: Loligo forbesii (sometimes erroneously spelled forbesi), known commonly as the veined squid and long-finned squid, is a commercially important species of squid in the family Loliginidae, the pencil squids.

children.name: Loligo reynaudii
children.description: Loligo reynaudii, commonly known as the Cape Hope squid or chokka squid, is a long squid belonging to the family Loliginidae.

children.name: Loligo vietnamensis
children.description: Loligo vietnamensis — a species in the genus Loligo, family Loliginidae. Also known as inshore squids.

children.description: Alloteuthis — a genus of inshore squids in the family Loliginidae.

children.name: Alloteuthis africana
children.description: Alloteuthis africana, also known as the African squid, is a species of squid in the family Loliginidae.

children.name: Alloteuthis media
children.description: Alloteuthis media, the midsize squid or little squid, is a species of squid in the family Loliginidae from the eastern Atlantic and the Mediterranean Sea.

children.name: Alloteuthis subulata
children.description: Alloteuthis subulata, the European common squid, is a species of squid in the family Loliginidae.

children.name: Sepioteuthis
children.description: Sepioteuthis — a genus of inshore squids in the family Loliginidae.

children.name: Sepioteuthis australis
children.description: Sepioteuthis australis, commonly known as the southern calamari or the southern reef squid, is a species of reef squid that is native to oceans off the coast of Australia and New Zealand.

children.name: Sepioteuthis loliginiformis
children.description: Sepioteuthis loliginiformis — a species in the genus Sepioteuthis, family Loliginidae. Also known as inshore squids.

children.name: Doryteuthis gahi
children.description: Doryteuthis gahi, also known as Loligo, the Patagonian longfin squid and Patagonian squid (Spanish: calamar patagónico or just calamar), is a small-sized squid belonging to the family Loliginidae.

children.name: Doryteuthis ocula
children.description: Doryteuthis ocula, commonly known as the bigeye inshore squid, is a species of squid in the family Loliginidae.

children.name: Doryteuthis opalescens
children.description: Doryteuthis opalescens, the opalescent inshore squid or market squid, is a small species of squid in the family Loliginidae.

children.description: Doryteuthis surinamensis, also known as the Surinam squid, is a small species of squid in the Loliginidae family.
